title: • Example Buffs:
content:
• Example Buffs:
• Balanced Party (Mix of Archetypes) → +1 Reroll on Random Events.
• Pure Party (Same Archetype Group) → Stronger Buffs But Higher Risks.

✔ 5️⃣ Secret Alignment (Hidden Personal Morality)
• Each player has a secret moral alignment that evolves over time.
• Example Alignments:
• The Loyalist (Always serves their faction first.)
• The Opportunist (Prioritizes self-interest & flexibility.)
• The Martyr (Willing to sacrifice personal gain for others.)
• The Betrayer (Thrives on subversion & deception.)

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds strategic depth—players must consider both narrative and gameplay choices.
✔ Encourages meaningful interactions and role-playing elements.
✔ Prevents stale character choices by allowing fluid party formations.

📜 2. The Role of the “Fallen Angel” & Alternate Approaches
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 470 (chunk 470/555)
